items.title: ZenaTech’s ZenaDrone Initiates Defense-focused Quantum Navigation System for GPS-Denied Drone Operations
Novavax Swings To Profit In Q4 Fueled By Nuvaxovid-Linked Revenue
items.description: The company generated $147 million in revenue during Q4, a 67% year-on-year (YoY) increase. Earnings per share (EPS) for the quarter were $0.11.

items.title: ARRY Stock Cracks 26%, On Track To Hit 200-DMA For First Time In 3 Months – Retail Says Valuation Is ‘Cheap’
items.description: Array’s Q4 revenue fell 17% year-on-year to $226 million, while net loss widened to $145.7 million.

items.title: IBRX Stock Rises Pre-Market After ANKTIVA Combo Shows Stronger Bladder Cancer Responses In Phase 2 Trial
items.description: The company said it plans to submit a biologics license application by the fourth quarter of 2026.

items.title: Dan Ives Believes Nvidia Dominance Is Underestimated, Says AI Spending Proves Skeptics Wrong: Report
